# @sanjilraj/pern-auth-utils

JWT authentication utilities for PERN stack projects.

## Installation

```bash
npm install @sanjilraj/pern-auth-utils
```

## Functions

| Function | Description |
|---|---|
| `createToken(user, secret)` | Create signed JWT token |
| `verifyToken(token, secret)` | Verify and decode JWT token |
| `createAuthMiddleware(secret)` | Express auth middleware factory |
| `requireAdmin` | Admin-only route guard middleware |
| `canAccessUser(req, targetId)` | Check user access permission |
| `sanitizeUser(user)` | Remove sensitive fields from user object |
| `createOAuthState()` | Generate secure OAuth state string |
| `setOAuthStateCookie(res, provider, state)` | Set OAuth state cookie |
| `verifyOAuthState(req, res, provider)` | Verify OAuth state and clear cookie |

## Usage

### Basic JWT Auth

```js
const {
    createToken,
    createAuthMiddleware,
    requireAdmin,
    sanitizeUser
} = require('@sanjilraj/pern-auth-utils');

const JWT_SECRET = process.env.JWT_SECRET;

// Create middleware
const authenticateToken = createAuthMiddleware(JWT_SECRET);

// Login route
app.post('/auth/login', async (req, res) => {
    const user = await getUserFromDB(req.body.email);
    const token = createToken(user, JWT_SECRET);
    res.json({ token, user: sanitizeUser(user) });
});

// Protected route
app.get('/profile', authenticateToken, (req, res) => {
    res.json({ userId: req.auth.userId });
});

// Admin only route
app.get('/admin', authenticateToken, loadCurrentUser, requireAdmin, (req, res) => {
    res.json({ message: 'Admin area' });
});
```

### OAuth State Management

```js
const {
    createOAuthState,
    setOAuthStateCookie,
    verifyOAuthState
} = require('@sanjilraj/pern-auth-utils');

// Initiate OAuth
app.get('/auth/google', (req, res) => {
    const state = createOAuthState();
    setOAuthStateCookie(res, 'google', state);
    res.redirect(`https://accounts.google.com/...&state=${state}`);
});

// Callback
app.get('/auth/google/callback', (req, res) => {
    if (!verifyOAuthState(req, res, 'google')) {
        return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid state' });
    }
    // Continue with OAuth flow...
});
```

### User Access Guard

```js
const { canAccessUser } = require('@sanjilraj/pern-auth-utils');

app.get('/users/:id', authenticateToken, loadCurrentUser, (req, res) => {
    if (!canAccessUser(req, req.params.id)) {
        return res.status(403).json({ error: 'Access denied' });
    }
    // Return user data...
});
```

## Environment Variables

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `JWT_SECRET` | Secret key for signing JWT tokens |
| `NODE_ENV` | Set to `production` for secure cookies |
